title: Echoes Of Londor
description: Soulslike RPG adventure with deadly combat, harsh survival, and dark, immersive world.
body:
About Echoes Of Londor

The FazBrick Studios Team presents Echoes of Londor. Built for Minecraft 1.20.1 and fully compatible with multiplayer, this modpack delivers the ultimate Soulslike experience.

Echoes of Londor focuses on bringing the brutal combat, oppressive atmosphere, and rewarding exploration of From Software’s games into Minecraft without losing the charm of the Vanilla experience. Featuring over 70 carefully curated mods, it offers a vast variety of weapons, armor, enemies, bosses, and structures to ensure a fully immersive adventure.

Your journey will take you through hostile lands, dangerous dungeons, and haunting landscapes, where every battle could be your last. Upgrade your gear, master unique combat mechanics, and uncover the secrets hidden within a dark and unforgiving world.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b0d16a9d729040cf15923b9164f8d607e384ac4_0.webp)

                               Fight Survival and Conquer

Embark on a perilous journey through treacherous lands filled with deadly enemies, imposing castles, and haunting ruins to explore.

Face relentless hordes, powerful mini-bosses, and iconic Soulslike bosses that will test your skill, patience, and strategy.

Upgrade your weapons, armor, and spells as you progress, mastering unique combat mechanics and uncovering rare loot to survive in a world where every victory is hard-earned.

Your journey will take you through treacherous lands, dangerous dungeons, and haunting ruins, where every step forward could lead to glory or death. Face relentless hordes, powerful mini-bosses, and iconic Soulslike bosses that will test your skill, patience, and strategy.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7f9dcf6522ebb07002add609002864743ed4fca_0.webp)

No safety or comfort awaits you here. Hostile mobs, hunger, and punishing mechanics are always active to maintain the harsh spirit of the experience. Master unique weapons, shields, and spells, each with their own movesets and strategies. Immerse yourself in a dark, atmospheric soundtrack that shifts with battles, exploration, and boss encounters. Use in-game maps, cryptic notes, and scattered landmarks to navigate a world shrouded in mystery, where secrets hide in every shadow.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94bad750ed5785f1b86e82c041663f293a13f8b9_0.webp)

🗡️ Start your journey instantly! With 1-click server installation powered by Nitrado and Apex Hosting, you and your friends can dive into the mysterious world of Echoes of Londor in no time!

To get started, all you need is a Minecraft Java server with at least 4GB of RAM or more (recommended for smoother gameplay with multiple players). With just one click from your control panel, you can instantly install Echoes of Londor [CurseForge] and begin your perilous adventure today!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fed4c0bbc2dbf718ae573c54c551bc97cd12cdf_0.webp)

This specifically includes RU-Minecraft.
